---
name: Security report (DO NOT USE)
about: For security-sensitive reports, please follow SECURITY.md instead
title: "[Security] use private disclosure - see SECURITY.md"
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> **Stop.** Public GitHub issues are not the right place for security-sensitive reports.
>
> Please report vulnerabilities through **[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/tcheuD/anon-pii/security/advisories/new)**.
>
> See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for what to include and the response timeline.

If you opened this issue by mistake, please close it and use the private channel above. Do not paste reproduction details, real PII, mapping files, or credentials in this issue.
